behavioral_rules: For process learnings and feedback: create lesson artifacts in .orqa/process/lessons/ instead of auto-memory files. Use auto-memory only for user-specific preferences (user type) and external references (reference type). Relationship type fields in artifact frontmatter MUST use types defined in plugin manifests (provides.relationships[].key or .inverse). Invalid types are rejected by pre-commit hook and PreAction hook. When an epic is scoped: sync session state steps and task list with the epic's tasks — work against the epic's defined tasks, not ad-hoc.
session_reminders: Relationship types are schema-driven — valid types come from plugin manifests (provides.relationships[]). Run `node .githooks/validate-relationships.mjs --all` to check all artifacts. Session state MUST include the scoped epic (EPIC-XXXXXXXX) so the stop hook can check completion.
